data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Automatic bid extension if bid in final hour (prevent sniping)', but the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. While the auction scenario describes an extension of the bidding time when Sarah increases her bid with 10 minutes left, there is no explicit evidence from API responses or state checks to validate that this behavior is implemented correctly. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the validation of this requirement.
gaps: Automatic bid extension requirement is not validated through API reads or persisted state checks.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
